Off Calendar Jan-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Yasha Rahimzadhe, 916.337.8066 for Defendant Hai Le.
Ronald St. Marie, 310.945.0280 ext 247 for Plaintiffcatedral Hill Tower Condominium Association.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CATHEDRAL HILL TOWER CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION INC Notice Of Motion And Renewed Motion For Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED. There is a likelihood Plaintiff will prevail on the merits, and the interim harm suffered by Plaintiff outweighs the harms suffer by Defendant by the granting of the preliminary injunction. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
